error_signature: clickedRow variable does not record item.data.id
title: DataGrid row click not updating clickedRow variable
symptom: The clickedRow variable fails to store the item.data.id when a row is clicked, leading to issues in displaying modal information.
applies_when: Attempting to store clicked row ID in a variable
not_this_if: clickedRow variable is correctly set to type object
root_cause: The clickedRow variable must be correctly configured to store the row ID as an object. If it is not set to the correct type or updated properly, it will not retain the expected value.
fix_steps: Set the clickedRow variable type to object
On click, perform a partial update of clickedRow with item.id
Ensure the value is set as item.id as a key:value pair
agent_instruction: Configure the clickedRow variable as an object and update it correctly on row click.
